channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 170
item.description: Chapter 170 “Don’t be scared, don’t be scared. Mother Consort is here,” Jian Xi said, holding her little one in her arms to comfort her. The little one’s mood improved slightly. Soon, the carriage reached the Princess’s mansion gate. Jian Xi carried the little white bundle out of the carriage and walked toward the mansion.…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 167
item.description: Chapter 167 Hearing Zhao Xian’s curses at Gao Yuanxun, Liang Mengye curled up on the ground, too terrified to move. “Speaking of which, I haven’t decided how you’ll die,” Gao Yuanxun sighed, as if facing a tough choice. “Staging a guilty suicide saves trouble, but it feels… unsatisfying.” She glanced at Liang Mengye, chuckling. “Liang…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 133
item.description: Chapter 133 Under Qiao Ni’s continuous experiments and improvements, Lu Zhao’s pheromone balance did not repeatedly require surgeries like Sheng Jingyu’s in the past. Moreover, Qiao Ni’s hands were extremely steady. Neither Cheng Xin nor An Cen could match her skill. Lu Zhao’s gland showed no trace of stitches. This technique helped her body recover…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 132 Car Accident
item.description: Chapter 132: Car Accident Bang— A bottle was thrown in and shattered, releasing a sharp smell that instantly filled the air. Gu Feiran raised her hand to cover her nose and mouth, stepped forward to turn on the light, and looked at the small broken medicine bottle on the floor. The white liquid inside was…
